description: parseWebhookPayload wraps JSON.parse in try/catch and returns null on failure; parseConfigBlob and parseManifestBlob let the SyntaxError propagate.

findings.rationale: parseWebhookPayload wraps JSON.parse in try/catch; the other two parsers let the exception propagate. The guard is load-bearing on the webhook ingress path: external payloads can be malformed and an uncaught SyntaxError crashes the worker. Unifying onto a shared parser that drops the try/catch turns a single bad webhook into a DoS.
